rows.name: Wall Jump
rows.notes: Counter-hit state during entire duration; can be done from Back or Neutral jump if fully against the wall, or after Forward Jump against a cornered opponent; cannot be performed after j.2HP or j.214K

raw.notes: Counter-hit state during entire duration; can be done from Back or Neutral jump if fully against the wall, or after Forward Jump against a cornered opponent; cannot be performed after j.2HP or j.214K

rows.name: Run
rows.notes: Input by holding forward after a forward dash; cancelable into 6P or 6K follow-ups on frames 18-72; after 72f, Rashid has 18f stopping recovery if no follow-up is input (90f total); stopping the run early has 5f recovery; no stopping recovery if jumping forward out of the run animation (neutral/back jump still plays out the 5f recovery); counter-hit state during entire run animation; affected by Air Current for entire duration except for 18f recovery, causing Rashid to run faster

raw.notes: Input by holding forward after a forward dash; cancelable into 6P or 6K follow-ups on frames 18-72; after 72f, Rashid has 18f stopping recovery if no follow-up is input (90f total); stopping the run early has 5f recovery; no stopping recovery if jumping forward out of the run animation (neutral/back jump still plays out the 5f recovery); counter-hit state during entire run animation; affected by Air Current for entire duration except for 18f recovery, causing Rashid to run faster

rows.name: Backup
rows.notes: Crouching state for entire move duration; on hit, connects twice and switches sides, remaining projectile invincible throughout the entire animation; on block, connects once and stays on the same side; if opponent is cornered, Rashid is close enough for a follow-up combo; counter-hit/Punish Counter bonus advantage applies to both hits; frames 1-17 can be affected by Air Current

raw.notes: Crouching state for entire move duration; on hit, connects twice and switches sides, remaining projectile invincible throughout the entire animation; on block, connects once and stays on the same side; if opponent is cornered, Rashid is close enough for a follow-up combo; counter-hit/Punish Counter bonus advantage applies to both hits; frames 1-17 can be affected by Air Current

rows.name: Tempest Moon
rows.notes: Counter-hit/Punish Counter bonus advantage applies to both hits; frames 1-3 can be affected by Air Current, becoming the Enhanced version

raw.notes: Counter-hit/Punish Counter bonus advantage applies to both hits; frames 1-3 can be affected by Air Current, becoming the Enhanced version

rows.name: Tempest Moon (Air Current)
rows.notes: Puts opponent into limited juggle OTG state if first hit connects (regular knockdown if first hit doesn't connect)

raw.notes: Puts opponent into limited juggle OTG state if first hit connects (regular knockdown if first hit doesn't connect)

rows.name: Side Flip
rows.notes: Can input 4KK/5KK/6KK follow-up on frames 19-25; collision box disappears frames 8-23, allowing Rashid to pass through opponents; can be affected by Air Current on frames 2-20, traveling nearly fullscreen; travel distance: 1.7 (3.62 enhanced)

raw.notes: Can input 4KK/5KK/6KK follow-up on frames 19-25; collision box disappears frames 8-23, allowing Rashid to pass through opponents; can be affected by Air Current on frames 2-20, traveling nearly fullscreen; travel distance: 1.7 (3.62 enhanced)

rows.name: Front Flip
rows.notes: Input during 6KK; holding forward/back/neutral direction affects flip distance; can use any air attack frames 22-40; can be affected by Air Current on frames 1-36, traveling forward fullscreen

raw.notes: Input during 6KK; holding forward/back/neutral direction affects flip distance; can use any air attack frames 22-40; can be affected by Air Current on frames 1-36, traveling forward fullscreen

rows.name: Spinning Mixer
rows.notes: Fullscreen advancing move that gives a combo on hit and frame advantage on block; counter-hit/Punish Counter bonus advantage applies through all hits (allows for a stronger follow-up combo)

raw.notes: Fullscreen advancing move that gives a combo on hit and frame advantage on block; counter-hit/Punish Counter bonus advantage applies through all hits (allows for a stronger follow-up combo)

rows.name: Spinning Mixer
rows.notes: On block, gets +1 hit vs. tall standing characters, and -1 hit vs. crouching characters (affects block data, chip, meter gain, etc.); cannot anti-air cross-ups; travels fullscreen

raw.notes: On block, gets +1 hit vs. tall standing characters, and -1 hit vs. crouching characters (affects block data, chip, meter gain, etc.); cannot anti-air cross-ups; travels fullscreen

rows.name: Spinning Mixer
rows.notes: Good anti-air that can hit cross-ups

raw.notes: Good anti-air that can hit cross-ups

rows.name: Spinning Mixer
rows.notes: Cannot anti-air cross-ups; 12f worse advantage and 2 fewer hits when crouch blocked; on hit or block, Rashid can cancel into j.214K on frames 67-71 after the active period

raw.notes: Cannot anti-air cross-ups; 12f worse advantage and 2 fewer hits when crouch blocked; on hit or block, Rashid can cancel into j.214K on frames 67-71 after the active period

rows.name: Eagle Spike (Air Current)
rows.notes: Puts opponent into limited juggle state on hit; on block, bounces off opponent with extra recovery (frame advantage unaffected by which active frame connects); on hit, Rashid gets better KD Advantage on later active frames; SA3 cancel occurs on hit only, allowing it to be freely buffered for extra damage

raw.notes: Puts opponent into limited juggle state on hit; on block, bounces off opponent with extra recovery (frame advantage unaffected by which active frame connects); on hit, Rashid gets better KD Advantage on later active frames; SA3 cancel occurs on hit only, allowing it to be freely buffered for extra damage

rows.name: Eagle Spike (Air Current)
rows.notes: Functions identically to enhanced 214HK; puts opponent into limited juggle state on hit; on hit/block, bounces off opponent with extra recovery (frame advantage unaffected by which active frame connects); opponent slides on the ground for great corner carry; Punish Counter tumble allows for a follow-up 214K for even more damage and corner carry

raw.notes: Functions identically to enhanced 214HK; puts opponent into limited juggle state on hit; on hit/block, bounces off opponent with extra recovery (frame advantage unaffected by which active frame connects); opponent slides on the ground for great corner carry; Punish Counter tumble allows for a follow-up 214K for even more damage and corner carry

rows.name: Eagle Spike (Air Current)
rows.notes: Functions identically to enhanced 214MK; puts opponent into limited juggle state on hit; on hit/block, bounces off opponent with extra recovery (frame advantage unaffected by which active frame connects); opponent slides on the ground for great corner carry; Punish Counter tumble allows for a follow-up 214K for even more damage and corner carry

raw.notes: Functions identically to enhanced 214MK; puts opponent into limited juggle state on hit; on hit/block, bounces off opponent with extra recovery (frame advantage unaffected by which active frame connects); opponent slides on the ground for great corner carry; Punish Counter tumble allows for a follow-up 214K for even more damage and corner carry

rows.name: Eagle Spike (Air Current)
rows.notes: Puts opponent into limited juggle state on hit and side switches if the opponent is not cornered; on block, bounces off opponent with extra recovery (frame advantage unaffected by which active frame connects); on hit, Rashid gets better KD Advantage on later active frames

raw.notes: Puts opponent into limited juggle state on hit and side switches if the opponent is not cornered; on block, bounces off opponent with extra recovery (frame advantage unaffected by which active frame connects); on hit, Rashid gets better KD Advantage on later active frames

rows.name: Whirlwind Shot (Partial Hold)
rows.notes: 2-hit projectile; trajectory depends on button strength (LK = farthest/horizontal, MK = middle, HK = shortest/vertical); must hold button 28f; counter-hit/Punish Counter bonus advantage applies to both hits; projectile comes out in 6f if button is released from frames 28-47 (total startup 34-53f); cannot use if SA2 is active

raw.notes: 2-hit projectile; trajectory depends on button strength (LK = farthest/horizontal, MK = middle, HK = shortest/vertical); must hold button 28f; counter-hit/Punish Counter bonus advantage applies to both hits; projectile comes out in 6f if button is released from frames 28-47 (total startup 34-53f); cannot use if SA2 is active

rows.name: Whirlwind Shot (Hold)
rows.notes: 3-hit projectile; trajectory depends on button strength (LK = farthest/horizontal, MK = middle, HK = shortest/vertical); must hold button 48f for fully charged version; counter-hit/Punish Counter bonus advantage applies to all hits; creates Air Current effect on frame 51 next to Rashid that lasts 60f and enhances many of his moves; cannot use if SA2 is active

raw.notes: 3-hit projectile; trajectory depends on button strength (LK = farthest/horizontal, MK = middle, HK = shortest/vertical); must hold button 48f for fully charged version; counter-hit/Punish Counter bonus advantage applies to all hits; creates Air Current effect on frame 51 next to Rashid that lasts 60f and enhances many of his moves; cannot use if SA2 is active

rows.name: Whirlwind Shot (Hold)
rows.notes: 3-hit OD projectile; 3rd hit puts opponent into limited juggle state on hit; must hold button 32f for fully charged version; travels fullscreen; cancelable into Wing Stroke (4K) and Rolling Assault (6K) follow-ups on frame 55 (can be buffered on frame 37 onward); cancel into Roll is -4 oB from point blank but massively plus on block from farther away; hitbox is low to the ground, making many low-profile anti-projectile moves ineffective; creates Air Current effect on frame 38 next to Rashid that lasts 70f and enhances many of his moves; cannot use if SA2 is active

raw.notes: 3-hit OD projectile; 3rd hit puts opponent into limited juggle state on hit; must hold button 32f for fully charged version; travels fullscreen; cancelable into Wing Stroke (4K) and Rolling Assault (6K) follow-ups on frame 55 (can be buffered on frame 37 onward); cancel into Roll is -4 oB from point blank but massively plus on block from farther away; hitbox is low to the ground, making many low-profile anti-projectile moves ineffective; creates Air Current effect on frame 38 next to Rashid that lasts 70f and enhances many of his moves; cannot use if SA2 is active

rows.name: Wing Stroke
rows.notes: Cancelable into air normals/specials on frames 32-51; can be affected by Air Current on frames 23-47; 6f landing recovery occurs if no air move is used

raw.notes: Cancelable into air normals/specials on frames 32-51; can be affected by Air Current on frames 23-47; 6f landing recovery occurs if no air move is used

rows.name: Rolling Assault
rows.notes: Crouching state 6-33f; cancelable into Nail Assault follow-up on frames 17-20; can be affected by Air Current on frames 8-25; can roll under most projectiles (loses to low ones like Juri 236LK or Rashid 236KK); Hit/Block Advantage after 214P connects: 214LP/214MP -5/-13; 214HP KD+43/+1; 214PP KD+39/-16

raw.notes: Crouching state 6-33f; cancelable into Nail Assault follow-up on frames 17-20; can be affected by Air Current on frames 8-25; can roll under most projectiles (loses to low ones like Juri 236LK or Rashid 236KK); Hit/Block Advantage after 214P connects: 214LP/214MP {{sf6-adv|VM|-5/-13}}; 214HP KD+43/{{sf6-adv|P|+1}}; 214PP KD+39/{{sf6-adv|VM|-16}}

rows.name: Nail Assault
rows.notes: Puts opponent into limited juggle state; crouching state for entire move duration; cannot hit cross-ups behind Rashid; outside of juggles, only combos naturally from 214HP/214PP versions

raw.notes: Puts opponent into limited juggle state; crouching state for entire move duration; cannot hit cross-ups behind Rashid; outside of juggles, only combos naturally from 214HP/214PP versions

rows.name: Neutral Taunt
rows.notes: "Do this... and this... and this. It's easy as pie."; hurtbox shifts as Rashid moves (lower body invuln frames 52-74, 83-107, 208-236; low profile 121-141, 169-186)

raw.notes: "Do this... and this... and this. It's easy as pie."; hurtbox shifts as Rashid moves (lower body invuln frames 52-74, 83-107, 208-236; low profile 121-141, 169-186)

rows.name: Forward Taunt
rows.notes: "Hmm? Hey look, just relax and have fun, alright?"

raw.notes: "Hmm? Hey look, just relax and have fun, alright?"

rows.name: Back Taunt
rows.notes: "Check this out! Now you try."

raw.notes: "Check this out! Now you try."
